subject: Refund request for headphones - defective
body: Hi, I bought a pair of headphones last month (ORD-1001) but they stopped working after a week. The left speaker just died. I'd like a full refund please.
expected_resolution: Approve refund - within warranty, defective product

subject: I want to return my watch
body: Hello, I received my smart watch on March 4th (order ORD-1002) but I don't like it. Can I return it for a refund? I haven't used it.
expected_resolution: Deny - return window expired (15-day for high-value electronics, order 18 days ago)

subject: Coffee maker stopped working
body: My BrewMaster coffee maker (ORD-1003) stopped heating water about 2 weeks ago. It's clearly a defect. I want a replacement or refund.
expected_resolution: Escalate as warranty claim - return window expired but warranty active (12 months)

subject: Wrong size delivered
body: I ordered size 10 running shoes (ORD-1004) and received size 9. This is unacceptable. I need the correct size or a full refund immediately.
expected_resolution: Approve exchange/refund - wrong item delivered, within return window

subject: Return request for speakers
body: Hi team, I'd like to return the two bluetooth speakers I ordered back in December (ORD-1005). I know it might be past the return window but I've been traveling. Can you help?
expected_resolution: Approve return - VIP customer with pre-approved exception for returns

subject: Tablet arrived damaged
body: The tablet I ordered (ORD-1008) arrived with a cracked screen. I immediately opened the box and confirmed the damage. Can you send a replacement?
expected_resolution: Approve replacement - damaged on arrival, full refund or replacement offered

subject: Changed my mind - return USB cables
body: I bought USB cables (ORD-1007) last week but I found a better deal elsewhere. Can I return these? They're still in original packaging, unused.
expected_resolution: Approve return - within 60-day window for electronics accessories, unused condition

subject: Return request
body: I'm returning the coffee maker I bought (ORD-1013) because I decided I don't want it. It's been 3 weeks. Is it too late?
expected_resolution: Approve return - within 30-day window, unused

subject: Missing items from order
body: I ordered 2 laptop stands (ORD-1016) but only received 1. Can you send the missing stand?
expected_resolution: Issue refund or send replacement for missing item

subject: Headphones defective after 2 weeks
body: The wireless headphones I got (ORD-1010) work fine for 2 weeks then stop. Clearly a defect. I want a replacement under warranty.
expected_resolution: Approve replacement under 12-month warranty

subject: Duplicate order received
body: I think I was charged twice for the wireless mouse (ORD-1011). I only ordered one but my card shows two charges. Can you refund the duplicate?
expected_resolution: Investigate billing - likely system error, approve refund for duplicate

subject: Wrong color delivered
body: I ordered the watch in black (ORD-1012) but received silver. I haven't opened the box. Can you send the correct color?
expected_resolution: Approve exchange - wrong variant delivered

subject: I want to exchange product
body: The coffee maker I bought (ORD-1003) is functional but I'm not happy with it. Can I exchange it for a different model? It's been 4 weeks.
expected_resolution: Deny - return window expired (30 days), offer warranty claim alternative

subject: Shoes are uncomfortable
body: The running shoes I ordered (ORD-1014) are uncomfortable. I wore them for a week. Can I return them?
expected_resolution: Deny - footwear used, hygiene policy prevents return of worn shoes

subject: Bluetooth speaker not connecting
body: One of my bluetooth speakers (ORD-1015) won't connect to my phone. I've tried everything. What should I do?
expected_resolution: Troubleshoot - provide technical support, escalate if needed

subject: Returned item but still charged
body: I returned the laptop stands (ORD-1016) 2 weeks ago but I was never refunded. Can you check on this?
expected_resolution: Investigate return status and issue refund if not processed

subject: Product arrived late and damaged
body: The USB cables (ORD-1017) took 2 weeks to arrive and the packaging was damaged. Cables seem okay but I'm worried about durability. What's the warranty?
expected_resolution: Provide warranty info, offer replacement if customer requests

subject: System error - please investigate
body: I keep getting an error when trying to return my yoga mat (ORD-1009). The system says it's not returnable. It should be within 30 days.
expected_resolution: Escalate - system error, manually process return

subject: Bulk return request
body: I purchased multiple items and realized I don't need most of them. I want to return headphones, mouse, and cables from orders ORD-1019. Can I do this?
expected_resolution: Approve items within return window, handle case-by-case

subject: Refund request
body: I want to return the wireless mouse (ORD-1020) because I changed my mind. I received it 5 days ago and haven't used it.
expected_resolution: Approve return - within 60-day window for accessories, unused
